ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crime_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime classification (e.g., Commercial Sex, Involuntary Servitude) */,
  "classification_description" TEXT /* Description of the crime classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the arrest data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrest record */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of arrestees (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of arrestees (e.g., Under 10, 10 to 12, 13 to 14) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of arrestees (e.g., White, Black, Asian) */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of arrestees in this demographic category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "juvenile_arrests" (
  "juvenile_arrest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each juvenile arrest record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the arrest data */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the classification of the crime */,
  "juvenile_count" INTEGER /* Total number of juvenile arrests for this classification */,
  "charge_details" TEXT /* Details of the charges filed against the juvenile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("juvenile_arrest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_juvenile_arrests_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES crime_classifications ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_juvenile_arrests_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adult_arrests" (
  "adult_arrest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adult arrest record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the arrest data */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the classification of the crime */,
  "adult_count" INTEGER /* Total number of adult arrests for this classification */,
  "charge_details" TEXT /* Details of the charges filed against the adult */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adult_arrest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adult_arrests_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adult_arrests_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES crime_classifications ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer record */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the officer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the officer is assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each incident record */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the incident occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id")
)
